Featured

Premium Dashboard Kit

A comprehensive toolkit for building modern admin dashboards with dark mode support and real-time analytics.

$49 ★ 4.8

props.title: Premium Dashboard Kit
props.description: A comprehensive toolkit for building modern admin dashboards.

suggestions.title: Add responsive breakpoints
suggestions.description: This component may not adapt well to mobile viewports. Consider a mobile-first responsive strategy.

suggestions.title: Excellent performance
suggestions.description: This component is lightweight and will load quickly even on slow connections.

explanation.layout: Vertical card layout maximizes scannability. Image → Content → CTA follows the natural reading flow (F-pattern).
explanation.colors: Gradient header creates visual interest without overwhelming the content area. Indigo accent ties to SaaS branding conventions.
explanation.typography: Three-level type hierarchy (title → description → meta) creates clear information architecture.
explanation.spacing: 20px body padding creates breathing room. 16px gaps between sections follow 8px grid.
explanation.accessibility: Button includes aria-label. Color contrast ratios meet WCAG AA. Focus styles are visible.
explanation.performance: No images used in header (CSS gradient). Minimal DOM nodes. Single hover animation with transform (GPU-composited).

reasoningChain: Optimizing Flexbox hierarchy for mobile responsiveness...
Generating accessible ARIA labeling for component tree...
prompt: A modern product card with hover effects

prompt: A modern product card with hover effects

html:
Analytics Overview

Total Users 24,891 +12.5%
Revenue $84,230 +8.2%
Conversion 3.24% -0.8%
Avg. Session 4m 32s +1.1%

suggestions.title: Add ARIA labels
suggestions.description: The dashboard component should include aria-label attributes for interactive elements to improve screen reader support.

suggestions.title: Consider lazy loading
suggestions.description: Heavy components should be lazy-loaded to reduce initial bundle size and improve Time to Interactive.

suggestions.title: Add responsive breakpoints
suggestions.description: This component may not adapt well to mobile viewports. Consider a mobile-first responsive strategy.

suggestions.title: Use semantic HTML
suggestions.description: Replace generic <div> wrappers with semantic tags like <article>, <section>, or <nav> to improve SEO signals.

explanation.layout: 4-column stat grid provides at-a-glance KPIs. Chart below gives temporal context. This follows the dashboard "overview → detail" pattern.
explanation.colors: Dark background reduces eye strain for data-heavy interfaces. Green/red semantic colors for change indicators are universally understood.
explanation.typography: Large stat values (22px) are scannable. Uppercase labels with wide tracking create visual separation.
explanation.spacing: 24px container padding, 16px grid gap — all on the 8px grid.
explanation.accessibility: Select has aria-label. Color is not the only indicator of positive/negative (+ and - signs included).
explanation.performance: CSS-only chart bars (no canvas/SVG library). Minimal JS needed. Stats are server-renderable.

reasoningChain: Optimizing Flexbox hierarchy for mobile responsiveness...
Generating accessible ARIA labeling for component tree...
